ttend_daily_count.desc: Number of time steps accumulated in the current daily tendency mean.

cloud_daily_count.desc: Number of radiation-step samples accumulated in the current daily cloud diagnostics mean.

ttend_lsc_accum.desc: Accumulated daily large-scale condensation temperature tendency

ttend_pbl_accum.desc: Accumulated daily boundary-layer and surface-flux temperature tendency

qtend_dyn_accum.desc: Accumulated daily dynamical specific humidity tendency

qtend_phy_accum.desc: Accumulated daily physical specific humidity tendency

qtend_cnv_accum.desc: Accumulated daily convective specific humidity tendency

qtend_lsc_accum.desc: Accumulated daily large-scale-condensation specific humidity tendency

qtend_pbl_accum.desc: Accumulated daily boundary-layer and surface-flux specific humidity tendency

utend_pbl_accum.desc: Accumulated daily boundary-layer and surface-flux eastward-wind tendency

vtend_pbl_accum.desc: Accumulated daily boundary-layer and surface-flux northward-wind tendency

utend_gwd_accum.desc: Accumulated daily orographic gravity-wave-drag eastward-wind tendency

vtend_gwd_accum.desc: Accumulated daily orographic gravity-wave-drag northward-wind tendency

ustr_sfc_accum.desc: Accumulated daily area-weighted surface eastward stress diagnostic

vstr_sfc_accum.desc: Accumulated daily area-weighted surface northward stress diagnostic

total_cloud_top_pressure_accum.desc: Accumulated daily total cloud-top pressure diagnostic

total_cloud_top_count.desc: Number of valid samples accumulated in the daily total cloud-top pressure diagnostic

conv_cloud_top_pressure_accum.desc: Accumulated daily convective cloud-top pressure diagnostic

conv_cloud_top_count.desc: Number of valid samples accumulated in the daily convective cloud-top pressure diagnostic

column_water_vapor_accum.desc: Accumulated daily column water vapor diagnostic

toa_sw_down_accum.desc: Accumulated daily incoming top-of-atmosphere shortwave radiation

toa_sw_up_accum.desc: Accumulated daily outgoing top-of-atmosphere shortwave radiation

toa_sw_net_accum.desc: Accumulated daily net top-of-atmosphere shortwave radiation (downward positive)

olr_accum.desc: Accumulated daily outgoing longwave radiation at the top of atmosphere

surface_lh_flux_accum.desc: Accumulated daily upward latent heat flux at the surface

surface_sh_flux_accum.desc: Accumulated daily upward sensible heat flux at the surface

surface_sw_down_accum.desc: Accumulated daily downward shortwave radiation at the surface

surface_sw_up_accum.desc: Accumulated daily upward shortwave radiation at the surface

surface_sw_net_accum.desc: Accumulated daily net shortwave radiation at the surface (downward positive)

surface_lw_down_accum.desc: Accumulated daily downward longwave radiation at the surface

surface_lw_up_accum.desc: Accumulated daily upward longwave radiation at the surface

surface_lw_net_accum.desc: Accumulated daily net longwave radiation at the surface (downward positive)

ttend_pbl_mean.desc: Daily-mean boundary-layer and surface-flux temperature tendency

qtend_pbl_mean.desc: Daily-mean boundary-layer and surface-flux specific humidity tendency

utend_pbl_mean.desc: Daily-mean boundary-layer and surface-flux eastward-wind tendency

vtend_pbl_mean.desc: Daily-mean boundary-layer and surface-flux northward-wind tendency

ustr_sfc_mean.desc: Daily-mean area-weighted surface eastward stress diagnostic

vstr_sfc_mean.desc: Daily-mean area-weighted surface northward stress diagnostic

toa_sw_net_mean.desc: Daily-mean net top-of-atmosphere shortwave radiation (downward positive)

olr_mean.desc: Daily-mean outgoing longwave radiation at the top of atmosphere

surface_lh_flux_mean.desc: Daily-mean upward latent heat flux at the surface

surface_sh_flux_mean.desc: Daily-mean upward sensible heat flux at the surface

surface_sw_down_mean.desc: Daily-mean downward shortwave radiation at the surface

surface_sw_up_mean.desc: Daily-mean upward shortwave radiation at the surface

surface_sw_net_mean.desc: Daily-mean net shortwave radiation at the surface (downward positive)

surface_lw_up_mean.desc: Daily-mean upward longwave radiation at the surface

surface_lw_net_mean.desc: Daily-mean net longwave radiation at the surface (downward positive)

tt_rsw.desc: Flux of short-wave radiation absorbed in each atmospheric layer

forog.desc: Orographic factor for land surface drag

increase_co2.desc: Flag for CO2 optical thickness increase

compute_shortwave.desc: Flag for shortwave radiation routine (turned on and off in main loop depending on the value of nstrad)

hs_tau_a_days.desc: Held-Suarez upper-air relaxation time in days

hs_tau_s_days.desc: Held-Suarez boundary-layer relaxation time in days

hs_min_pressure_ratio.desc: Held-Suarez minimum pressure ratio used in log(p/p0)

orographic_gwd_enabled.desc: Flag for the optional orographic gravity-wave-drag scheme

gwd_time_scale_days.desc: Reference drag time scale for the optional orographic gravity-wave-drag scheme

gwd_oro_threshold_m.desc: Orography threshold for the optional orographic gravity-wave-drag scheme

gwd_oro_scale_m.desc: Orography scale height used to saturate the optional orographic gravity-wave-drag scheme

gwd_launch_sigma.desc: Sigma level above which the optional orographic gravity-wave-drag profile is applied

air_absortivity_co2.desc: Absorptivity of air in CO2 band

hfseacl.desc: Annual-mean heat flux into sea sfc.

wsst_ob.desc: Weight for obs. SST anomaly in coupled runs

sst_anomaly_coupling_flag.desc: Weight for obs. SST anomaly in coupled runs

ablco2_ref.desc: Initial absorptivity of air in CO2 band (t=t0)

fband.desc: Energy fraction emitted in each LW band = f(T)

alb_sea.desc: Daily-mean albedo over sea  (open sea + sea ice)

rad_flux.desc: Radiative flux in different spectral bands

rad_st4a.desc: Blackbody emission from full and half atmospheric levels
